summary: Full backend + frontend testing of IBP Analytics Platform. 25/25 pytest cases passed against the live preview URL. Frontend had ONE critical compile-blocker (wrong phosphor-icons name 'FlaskConical') which I fixed; after the fix, all pages load and core flows (login, dashboard, calculator, async sweep job, experiments, compare, keys, admin) work end-to-end.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. Happens because the project's dev wrapper injects a <span style={display:contents}> into dynamic text expressions inside <option>. Dropdown still functions but console is polluted.

action_items: (Already fixed by test agent) Replaced FlaskConical -> Flask in Layout.jsx and Dashboard.jsx because FlaskConical is a Lucide icon name; @phosphor-icons/react exports Flask. This was a hard compile-break that prevented the entire app from rendering.
(Optional) Resolve the <span>-in-<option> hydration warning on /compare by rendering plain string labels (e.g., template literals) rather than JSX expressions that the devtool wraps with <span>.
critical_code_review_comments: ibp_service.py surrogate fallback is well-isolated and MODEL_SOURCE reports correctly (observed 'ibpmodel-2.x').
All MongoDB reads consistently project {_id: 0} and use the string 'id' field - good.
Password hashing uses bcrypt via passlib (auth.py) and $2b$ hashes are produced; seed_admin runs on startup.
JWT-only auth with x-api-key alternative header; tested both paths including revoke -> 401.
GRID_CAP of 10,000 enforced at /ibp/batch; rejects oversize grids with 400.
Cross-user job access returns 403 for non-admin, admin sees all - correct.
CSV streaming works with proper Content-Disposition and text/csv.
Files are all well under 700 lines and modular (routes_auth/ibp/keys/admin/experiments).
test_credentials: Admin admin@ibp.dev / admin123 (seeded & verified). Test users are auto-created via /api/auth/register using TEST_-prefixed random emails.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create ephemeral users with prefix TEST_ and small sweeps/experiments. Admin dashboard shows 7 users, 10 jobs, 2 api_keys as a result of this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: https://space-weather-hub-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Admin creds admin@ibp.dev/admin123. For sweep tests keep cells <= ~500 (e.g., lon_step=30, lt_step=1) to stay under 5s. Compare requires identical lon/lt grids; vary only day_month or f107. Batch uses BackgroundTasks - poll /api/ibp/job/{id}.
rca of the issue: FlaskConical was imported from @phosphor-icons/react in Layout.jsx and Dashboard.jsx, but Phosphor only exports 'Flask' (FlaskConical is a Lucide icon). This produced a webpack compile error shown as the webpack-dev-server-client-overlay iframe that intercepted ALL pointer events on the entire app, making it look like nothing was clickable. Fix: replaced FlaskConical -> Flask in both files. After hot reload, compile succeeded and all pages became interactive.
